caption: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and glasses stands against a plain black background, speaking and gesturing with her hands. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic with a decorative embroidered neckline and a thin dark necklace. A small clip-on microphone is attached to her garment. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a logo featuring a stylized gold and red emblem is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman is captured in mid-speech, her mouth opening and closing as she speaks. Her hands move actively to emphasize her points; initially, they are held open in front of her chest, then they shift as she gesticulates, with her fingers curving and moving closer together. Her facial expression remains focused and engaged throughout the sequence of frames.
